answer: To become a TEP Citizen: 1) Post in the Citizenship thread with your WA nation in TEP, 2) Reply to the telegram from a Citizenship Official, 3) Wait for acceptance. You must maintain that WA nation and residency in TEP.
Use the official Citizenship Application thread in 'Newcomers Start Here' on forum.theeastpacific.com. The Citizenship Office posts acceptances/denials there.
Citizenship becomes invalid 12 hours after you leave TEP or leave the WA on your recorded nation. Return and post in the thread within 12 hours to keep it.
